requirement_topic.en: INDOTEL Mandatory Homologación — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval (Ley General de Telecomunicaciones 153-98, INDOTEL Resolutions)
requirement_topic.zh: INDOTEL强制型式认可——无线电及电信终端设备型号认证（《电信总法》153-98，INDOTEL决议）
requirement_topic.zht: INDOTEL強制型式認可——無線電及電信終端裝置型號認證（《電信總法》153-98，INDOTEL決議）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi routers, Bluetooth devices, IoT hubs, smart speakers, and any device incorporating wireless radio technology — must obtain a mandatory INDOTEL homologación (type approval) certificate issued by the Instituto Dominicano de las Telecomunicaciones (INDOTEL) before import or sale in the Dominican Republic. The legal basis is Ley General de Telecomunicaciones 153-98 and subsequent INDOTEL resolutions. The homologación process requires submission of a technical dossier including accredited laboratory test reports for radio (RF), EMC, and electrical safety; a product description and technical specifications; and a declaration by the authorized Dominican importer or representative. INDOTEL may accept test reports from internationally accredited laboratories (e.g., ILAC-accredited); FCC and CE test reports may be accepted as a supporting basis for some parameters, reducing retesting burden for exporters who already hold those authorisations — but the INDOTEL homologación certificate is a separate Dominican administrative act and is not replaced by FCC, CE, SRRC, or CCC approvals. CCC is specifically not recognised. The INDOTEL homologación certificate number must be displayed on the Spanish-language product label. The Dominican Republic established diplomatic relations with China in 2018 (switching from Taiwan); Chinese electronics exports are growing through Port of Haina and Port of Santo Domingo.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi路由器、蓝牙设备、物联网集线器、智能音箱及任何内置无线技术的设备——在多米尼加共和国进口或销售前，须取得由多米尼加电信研究院（INDOTEL）颁发的强制型式认可（homologación）证书。法律依据为《电信总法》153-98及其后续INDOTEL决议。型式认可申请须提交技术文件，包括经认可实验室出具的无线电（射频）、EMC和电气安全检测报告、产品描述及技术规格，以及授权多米尼加进口商或代表的声明。INDOTEL可接受国际认可实验室（如ILAC认可）出具的检测报告；FCC和CE检测报告可作为部分参数的支持依据，有助于降低已持有上述授权的出口商的重测成本——但INDOTEL型式认可证书属独立的多米尼加行政行为，不能由FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准替代。CCC明确不被承认。INDOTEL型式认可证书编号须标注于产品的西班牙语标签上。多米尼加共和国于2018年（从台湾）与中国建立外交关系；通过海纳港和圣多明各港口的中国电子产品出口持续增长。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端裝置——包括Wi-Fi路由器、藍牙裝置、物聯網集線器、智慧音箱及任何內置無線技術的裝置——在多明尼加共和國進口或銷售前，須取得由多明尼加電信研究院（INDOTEL）頒發的強制型式認可（homologación）證書。法律依據為《電信總法》153-98及其後續INDOTEL決議。型式認可申請須提交技術文件，包括經認可實驗室出具的無線電（射頻）、EMC和電氣安全檢測報告、產品描述及技術規格，以及授權多明尼加進口商或代表的聲明。INDOTEL可接受國際認可實驗室（如ILAC認可）出具的檢測報告；FCC和CE檢測報告可作為部分參數的支持依據，有助於降低已持有上述授權的出口商的重測成本——但INDOTEL型式認可證書屬獨立的多明尼加行政行為，不能由FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准替代。CCC明確不被承認。INDOTEL型式認可證書編號須標注於產品的西班牙語標籤上。多明尼加共和國於2018年（從台灣）與中國建立外交關係；通過海納港和聖多明各港口的中國電子產品出口持續增長。

standards_or_laws: Ley General de Telecomunicaciones 153-98 — Dominican Republic telecommunications framework law; establishes mandatory homologación for radio and telecom terminal equipment
INDOTEL resolutions — INDOTEL-issued administrative resolutions specifying homologación procedures, technical requirements, and accepted laboratory accreditations
INDOTEL (Instituto Dominicano de las Telecomunicaciones) — Dominican telecom regulator; issues homologación certificates and sets radio equipment type-approval requirements

summary.en: In China, wireless devices must comply with MIIT (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology) type-approval requirements under the Radio Regulations and SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval. Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices additionally require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under the CNCA system for consumer electronics. MIIT SRRC approval covers radio frequency parameters; CCC covers safety and EMC. China also requires MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for certain telecommunications terminal equipment. GB standards (GB 15629, GB/T 29242, and related Wi-Fi/Bluetooth standards) form the technical basis. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT NAL are not recognised by INDOTEL and do not substitute for Dominican homologación.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备须符合工业和信息化部（MIIT）依据无线电管理条例的型号核准要求，以及国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）无线电型号核准。Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备还须依据CNCA体系取得消费电子产品CCC（中国强制认证）。MIIT SRRC核准涵盖无线电频率参数；CCC涵盖安全和EMC。中国还要求特定电信终端设备取得MIIT进网许可证（NAL）。GB标准（GB 15629、GB/T 29242及相关Wi-Fi/蓝牙标准）构成技术基础。中国SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL不被INDOTEL承认，不能替代多米尼加型式认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置須符合工業和資訊化部（MIIT）依據無線電管理條例的型號核准要求，以及國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）無線電型號核准。Wi-Fi和藍牙裝置還須依據CNCA體系取得消費電子產品CCC（中國強制認證）。MIIT SRRC核准涵蓋無線電頻率參數；CCC涵蓋安全和EMC。中國還要求特定電信終端設備取得MIIT進網許可證（NAL）。GB標準（GB 15629、GB/T 29242及相關Wi-Fi/藍牙標準）構成技術基礎。中國SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL不被INDOTEL承認，不能替代多明尼加型式認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval — mandatory radio frequency parameter certification for wireless devices in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory safety and EMC certification for consumer electronics in China under CNCA
MIIT NAL (Network Access Licence) — required for certain telecom terminal equipment sold in China
GB 15629 series — Chinese radio (Wi-Fi/802.11) technical standards

gap.en: Chinese SRRC radio type approval, CCC, and MIIT NAL are not recognised by INDOTEL and do not substitute for Dominican homologación. A separate INDOTEL homologación application must be filed with a technical dossier. FCC and CE test reports may be accepted as supporting data within the INDOTEL dossier, potentially reducing retesting cost for exporters who already hold those authorisations — but the INDOTEL certificate is a separate administrative act and is always required. CCC is specifically not recognised. The INDOTEL homologación certificate number must appear on the Spanish-language product label. Failure to obtain homologación before import or sale is a regulatory violation subject to penalties and product withdrawal in the Dominican Republic. China established diplomatic relations with the Dominican Republic in 2018, creating a growing trade corridor, but regulatory recognition is not automatic.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型号核准、CCC和MIIT NAL不被INDOTEL承认，不能替代多米尼加型式认可。须单独向INDOTEL提交含技术文件的型式认可申请。FCC和CE检测报告可作为INDOTEL文件内的支持数据，有助于降低已持有上述授权的出口商的重测成本——但INDOTEL证书属独立行政行为，须单独申请。CCC明确不被承认。INDOTEL型式认可证书编号须标注于产品的西班牙语标签上。进口或销售前未取得型式认可属违规行为，在多米尼加共和国面临处罚和产品下架风险。中国于2018年与多米尼加共和国建立外交关系，形成日益增长的贸易走廊，但监管认可并非自动授予。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型號核准、CCC和MIIT NAL不被INDOTEL承認，不能替代多明尼加型式認可。須單獨向INDOTEL提交含技術文件的型式認可申請。FCC和CE檢測報告可作為INDOTEL文件內的支持數據，有助於降低已持有上述授權的出口商的重測成本——但INDOTEL證書屬獨立行政行為，須單獨申請。CCC明確不被承認。INDOTEL型式認可證書編號須標注於產品的西班牙語標籤上。進口或銷售前未取得型式認可屬違規行為，在多明尼加共和國面臨處罰和產品下架風險。中國於2018年與多明尼加共和國建立外交關係，形成日益增長的貿易走廊，但監管認可並非自動授予。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INDOTEL homologación certificate required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale in the Dominican Republic under Ley General de Telecomunicaciones 153-98 and INDOTEL resolutions; CCC, SRRC, and MIIT NAL not recognised; FCC and CE test reports may assist as supporting data only
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval + CCC required for wireless consumer devices in China; MIIT NAL required for certain telecom terminal equipment

source.publisher: INDOTEL — Instituto Dominicano de las Telecomunicaciones (Dominican Republic)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INDOTEL homologación under Ley General de Telecomunicaciones 153-98 and INDOTEL resolutions is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment sold in the Dominican Republic. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT NAL approvals are not recognised. FCC and CE test reports may assist as supporting data within the INDOTEL dossier but do not replace the Dominican certificate. The homologación number must appear on the Spanish-language label. Verify current INDOTEL application procedures, accepted laboratory accreditations, fee schedules, and dossier requirements with a qualified Dominican regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《电信总法》153-98和INDOTEL决议，INDOTEL型式认可对所有在多米尼加共和国销售的无线电及电信终端设备为强制性要求。中国SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL核准不被承认。FCC和CE检测报告可作为INDOTEL文件内的支持数据，但不能替代多米尼加证书。型式认可编号须标注于西班牙语标签上。进入市场前请向合格的多米尼加监管专业人士核验现行INDOTEL申请程序、认可的实验室资质、收费标准和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《電信總法》153-98和INDOTEL決議，INDOTEL型式認可對所有在多明尼加共和國銷售的無線電及電信終端裝置為強制性要求。中國SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL核准不被承認。FCC和CE檢測報告可作為INDOTEL文件內的支持數據，但不能替代多明尼加證書。型式認可編號須標注於西班牙語標籤上。進入市場前請向合格的多明尼加監管專業人士核驗現行INDOTEL申請程序、認可的實驗室資質、收費標準和文件要求。
